author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
Prerequisite chain recorded (2026-06-22):

This ticket is blocked by:
1. `199ed91` — Bug → Issue rename (v2 spec bump).
2. `7100b51` — issue-type-field (adds `type:
   bug|feature|epic|research|roadmap|unspecified` to
   the schema).

After both land, this ticket's body needs a refresh:
references to `BugId` / `Bug` types become `IssueId` /
`Issue`, and the priority-sort logic gains the type
field to read.

Dep edges not declared in the storage layer because
the CLI doesn't expose `add_dependency` yet (storage
has `Storage::add_dependency` but no `jjf dep add`
verb). When the CLI dep verbs land, this comment
becomes the source for those edges.
